name: com.opedd/opedd-mcp
description: Licensed, rights-cleared content for AI agents - verifiable license keys + EU AI Act attestation.

environmentVariables.name: OPEDD_BUYER_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Your email — default buyer identity for purchases

environmentVariables.name: OPEDD_PAYMENT_METHOD_ID
environmentVariables.description: Stripe PaymentMethod id (pm_...) for autonomous per-article purchasing

environmentVariables.name: OPEDD_BUYER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Buyer API token (opedd_buyer_live_*) — enables licensed content retrieval

environmentVariables.name: OPEDD_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enterprise access key (ent_*) — enables bulk feed tools

environmentVariables.name: OPEDD_BUYER_JWT
environmentVariables.description: Buyer portal session JWT — enables account, audit, compliance + EU AI Act attestation tools

environmentVariables.name: OPEDD_PUB_BEARER
environmentVariables.description: Publisher API key (opedd_pub_*) — enables publisher content push + listing tools
